REPORTSUITE_NAME: <HUMAN-READABLE REPORT SUITE NAME (optional, falls back to RSID)>
_comment_api_version: Set API_VERSION to '2.0' for OAuth2, or '1.4' for WSSE (legacy)
_comment_oauth2: OAuth2 credentials from Adobe I/O Console (API 2.0)
AODBE_PROJECT_NAME: <NAME OF THE PROJECT IN ADOBE I/O CONSOLE>
ADOBE_PROJECT_URL: <URL OF THE PROJECT IN ADOBE I/O CONSOLE>
_comment_wsse: WSSE credentials for API 1.4 (legacy, also used for processing rules)
_comment_api14_timeout: Timeout in seconds for API 1.4 HTTP requests. Increase if you see spurious timeouts on slow connections. 500ms (0.5) is possible but aggressive; 5 is a safe default for cross-Pacific calls.
_comment_launch: Adobe Experience Platform Tags (Launch) integration (Roadmap v2-003). Set LAUNCH_ENABLED to true and provide the Tags Property ID to surface Launch rules on dimension detail pages. Requires API_VERSION 2.0 and the Reactor API scope added to your Adobe I/O project. LAUNCHPAD_URL enables deep-links from Codex to the Launchpad app (leave blank to show rule names without links). The feature is silently disabled if LAUNCH_ENABLED is false or LAUNCH_PROPERTY_ID is absent.
LAUNCHPAD_URL: <YOUR_LAUNCHPAD_URL (e.g. http://localhost:5000, or blank to disable deep links)>
_comment_auth: Authentication mode (Roadmap v2-004). AUTH_MODE 'server' (default) uses the OAuth2 CLIENT_ID/CLIENT_SECRET above as a service account — no user login required. AUTH_MODE 'user' enables per-user Adobe IMS login via OAuth Authorization Code flow; requires OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI and SESSION_SECRET.
